channel.title: Lacanian on Intermezzo: A Fuzzy Story
channel.description: Recent content in Lacanian on Intermezzo: A Fuzzy Story

item.title: Lacanian 1: the Big Other’s Absence and Inherent Lack
item.description: Philles symbolizes the inherent incompleteness and constructed nature of the Big Other, highlighting both its apparent absence and intrinsic lack.
